titles.title: Someday We Will Be in Heaven

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Someday we will be in heaven Standing in the presence of the Lord He will reward those who obey Him Accept those who accept Him in their heart.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Are you ready now to face Jesus? Are you doing now His will? Are You keeping all His commandments that He gave You Are you ready now to face the Lord?

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Don't waste the time that He had gave You Spend each day with Jesus in your heart Praying always in the spirit Always giving glory to the Lord.
